channel.title: Topics on Asymmetric Intelligence
channel.description: Deep context on the seven domains monitored by Asymmetric Intelligence.

item.title: AI Governance
item.description: AI capability developments, regulatory frameworks, investment flows, and the governance contest over artificial intelligence — tracked weekly.

item.title: Strategic Conflict & Escalation
item.description: Armed conflict trajectories, military escalation risks, and the geopolitical conditions driving them — tracked across eight active theatres weekly.

item.title: FIMI & Cognitive Warfare
item.description: Foreign Information Manipulation and Interference as a global cross-actor threat doctrine — campaigns, attribution, and the regulatory frameworks attempting to counter them.

item.title: Macro Monitor
item.description: Global financial system risk — debt dynamics, credit stress, market structure fragility, and systemic amplifiers tracked weekly.

item.title: Democratic Integrity
item.description: The slow erosion of democratic institutions, electoral systems, and civic space — tracked weekly between the annual indices.

item.title: Environmental Risks & Planetary Boundaries
item.description: Earth system risk, planetary boundary status, tipping points, and geopolitical cascades from environmental stress — tracked weekly.

item.title: European Strategic Autonomy
item.description: Europe's capacity to act independently in defence, technology, and geopolitical positioning — and the hybrid threats that contest it.
